rationale: Disabled automatic retries for artifact.publish_report_bundle until the publication path has an idempotency key, avoiding duplicate final report artifacts on retry.
Normalized report_scope before final-bundle validation so Final/FINAL cannot bypass final-report guards.
Bot review summary only; individual review comments were evaluated separately.
Report component payloads now encode JSON-serializable mappings and lists with json.dumps instead of bytes(payload).
Supporting artifacts intentionally retain the bundle report_scope; the canonical final report remains uniquely identified by report.primary plus metadata.is_final_report=true.
Gemini review summary only; individual review comments were evaluated separately.
